hero.title: Your Complete Finance Toolkit
hero.subtitle: Professional-grade financial calculators, AI-powered custom analysis, and interactive planning tools — all in one platform.

features.calculatorsDesc: Comprehensive calculators for loans, mortgages, investments, retirement, taxes, bonds, options, and more.
features.aiDesc: Describe your financial needs in plain language, and our AI generates a fully functional, editable calculator.
features.dashboardDesc: Save your custom calculators and financial plans, access them from your personal dashboard.
features.languagesDesc: Use QFINHUB in English, Spanish, or Hindi with automatic geo-detection.
features.widgetsDesc: Embed any calculator on your website or share results as images and PDFs.
features.designDesc: Clean, modern interface with a professional blue and green color scheme.

aiSpecialist.title: AI Custom Specialist
aiSpecialist.subtitle: Describe what you need in plain language
aiSpecialist.placeholder: e.g., Calculate my monthly mortgage payment...
aiSpecialist.greeting: What financial calculator would you like to build?
examples: Calculate my retirement savings with 7% growth over 30 years
Create a loan amortization schedule for a $50,000 car loan
Compare renting vs buying a $400,000 home
Calculate compound interest with monthly contributions

dashboard.noPlans: No saved plans yet. Try the AI Specialist!
